title: Italian Options Grosgrain Ribbon 25mm, Strong Plain Navy Ribbon for Bows, Wedding, Crafting, Sewing, Hair Accessories, Gift Wrap, 25 mm x 10 Metre Roll, Navy Blue
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Available in over 30 stunning colours and 4 widths, our premium grosgrain ribbons are made from 100% polyester, ideal for hair bows, gift wrapping, clothing, and crafts.

GROSGRAIN DESIGN: Crafted with a distinctive, sophisticated rib pattern with ridges running edge to edge, this durable, slightly stiff yet soft craft ribbon features a matte finish, making it a luxurious addition to any project.

A COLOUR FOR EVERY OCCASION: Elevate any gift, hair accessory, hat, outfit, or craft project with this elegant ribbon, available in a variety of colours, including burgundy, navy, pale blue, green, black, pink, emerald, red, lime, and turquoise.

MACHINE WASHABLE: Colourfast, machine washable, and dry-cleaning friendly, our grosgrain ribbons keep crafts clean and colours vibrant. REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX 100 certified to meet the highest safety and quality standards.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
